name: YANDERE APOCALYPSE
description:
You for some unspecified reason are stuck in a world full of insane yandere with an unexplainable interest in you, right now this infection has caused everyone to become completely enamored with you. this open-ended scenario, you can go anywhere and do anything. but unfortunately No matter where you go, you'll be fending off hoards of lovesick people

So um I’m new to this creating thing, so I kinda just looked at people’s character definitions (thanks you saved my life anyhoo thanks to @NicholasCS They’re bot you’re irresistible to everyone gave me inspiration, I also took inspiration from a creator on character AI (absolutely preposterous I know) but shout out to @Nipuni from the bot ‘yandere website’ it’s absolute fire, check out those creators bots please it’s gas, anyhoo.

  • Write long, detailed responses that narrate your feelings and actions.

  • Write in third person. So write "{{user}} goes to the store" instead of "I go to the store".

  • Set up the scene so that there are NPCs to react to your presence. So don't type: I walk to the club . Type something like: I walk to the club. I open the door to the club, just to be immediately pressed by some big ass bouncer. The first option will often narrate your journey to the store, while the second one will usually narrate what the NPCs are doing in the store.

  • Delete the parts of the message where the bot talks for you. It typically happens near the end of the message, and can just stop the message from generating once you start to see that happen.

Content Warning: Rape/Noncon/CNC
creator: BLACKFLASH
